## How to verify

<!-- Steps a reviewer can run to confirm the behavior. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `make ci` (or `pnpm run ci`) passes locally
- [ ] Tests added/updated for the change (regression test for a bug fix)
- [ ] Docs updated when a contract, config key, command, or rule changed
      (`docs/`, `README.md`, `CHANGELOG.md`)
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or credentials in the diff
